title: Wire-style editorial photo (Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA)

expected_findings.note: pHash matches a seeded wire-service entry (Hamming distance 0)
Earliest hit predates the alleged context — real-world parallel: Reuters/AP photos resurfacing

demo_narration: If the image already exists in a trusted wire-service feed, perceptual hashing matches it deterministically. The analyst no longer needs the AI to weigh in.
real_world_parallel: Routine OSINT pattern: a viral 'breaking' photo is actually a wire image lifted from Reuters/AP archives hours or years earlier.
